economic_notes: Business enterprises include Des Nedhe Development LP, Des Nedhe Investments LP, Des Nedhe Management Inc, English River Enterprises Inc, English River Enterprises LP No.1, English River Enterprises Property Management LP, English River Enterprises Equipment Rental LP, Tron Construction & Mining LP, Tron Industrial Services LP. Mining services segment incurred significant losses of $4.2M. Retail & Commercial Management segment had $214K earnings.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 ending March 31, 2022. Prior year (2021) figures were restated due to correction of error involving capital projects managed by third parties - deferred revenue increased by $887,127, tangible capital assets increased by $391,296, accounts payable increased, and accumulated surplus decreased by $887,127. Nine GBEs accounted for using modified equity method with significant aggregate losses of $5.2M in the year (primarily Mining Services losing $4.2M). Three consolidated subsidiaries: English River - Patuanak, English River - La Plonge, and English River CMHC Housing Program. Deferred revenue is very large at $16.1M mostly from ISC Capital Projects ($10.8M). total_government_transfers includes ISC $17,714,963 + CMHC $403,228 + Government of Saskatchewan $24,629 + Northern Lights School Division $439,335 + MLTC Program Services $2,988,839 + MLTC Child & Family Services $353,412 + Meadow Lake Health & Social Development $3,467,962 - noting MLTC entities may be tribal council transfers rather than direct government transfers. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers.
